abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: "Why Do YOU Get That..."
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 6" draws a card, this model may draw a card.

actions.name: Dual Gatling Guns
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target does not have cover, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Sound and Fury
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Craven token.

triggers.name: Smoking Guns
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

actions.name: What's Fair is Fair
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target leader only. Once per game. Set this crew's soulstone pool equal to the target's soulstone pool.

actions.name: Ominous Pipes
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemies within (aura)3" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Craven token. Then, if this action did not receive a raise, remove the made marker.
